summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration test on Gastómetro (Expo web preview, mobile viewport 390x844). Core flows work: home dashboard, FAB, add-expense modal with validation, category chips, date strip, save → returns to home and updates totals/recent list. Settings (budget, currency, dark mode toggle, reset, watermark), Goals (goal-row-food, badge-first_expense) and Stats (segmented control + habit-card) all render with the requested testIDs. AsyncStorage persistence not retested directly because each Playwright run starts in a fresh browser context (clean storage) — looked OK within a single session (state survived navigation). One blocking issue: the bottom tab bar testIDs (tab-home, tab-stats, tab-goals, tab-settings) do NOT appear in the DOM on web — tabBarTestID prop is not propagated by @react-navigation/bottom-tabs web implementation. Tabs themselves work and were reached via text/role.

ui_bugs.issue: tabBarTestID (tab-home/tab-stats/tab-goals/tab-settings) is not rendered as data-testid in the web DOM. Tabs render as <a role='tab'> with no testid. Test selectors specified in the PRD fail.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated, TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecated (add-expense.tsx). Non-blocking but should be cleaned.
useNativeDriver warning from Animated (no RCTAnimation on web) — animation falls back to JS, acceptable.

action_items: Fix tab bar testIDs for web: wrap each Tabs.Screen with tabBarButton that renders a Pressable with explicit testID (or use accessibilityLabel + a custom tabBar). Current tabBarTestID prop is ignored by @react-navigation/bottom-tabs on web.
Optional: replace deprecated TouchableWithoutFeedback in add-expense.tsx with Pressable and migrate shadow* props to boxShadow to silence web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Empty validation works (amount-input + save-expense shows 'Introduce un importe válido').
Add-expense flow updates hero-total (0,00 € → 25,50 € → 35,50 €) and stat-count correctly.
Budget modal (budget-input, budget-save) and currency modal (currency-EUR, currency-USD) found and operable.
Goals tab exposes goal-row-food and badge-first_expense as required.
Stats tab exposes segment-categories, segment-weekly and habit-card.

success_rate.frontend: ≈92% (12/13 areas pass; only tab testIDs missing on web)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 in-session expenses (Comida 25,50€ Almuerzo; Transporte 10€) — cleared with fresh browser contexts between runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use mobile viewport 390x844. To navigate tabs on web, use page.get_by_text('Estadísticas'|'Objetivos'|'Ajustes'|'Inicio').first.click(force=True) until main agent adds explicit data-testid on tab buttons. All other testIDs from the PRD are present and functional. AsyncStorage persists between reloads within the same browser context but Playwright launches a fresh context per script run.
rca_of_issue: tabBarTestID on Tabs.Screen options is consumed only by the native bottom-tabs implementation. On web (@react-navigation/bottom-tabs web build), the tab is rendered as <a role='tab'> and the testID prop is dropped, leaving no data-testid attribute. Fix: provide a custom tabBarButton via screenOptions/options that renders a Pressable with testID, e.g. options={{ tabBarButton: (props) => <Pressable testID='tab-home' {...props} /> }} for each Tabs.Screen.
